summary: Partner Delivery | Mapping | Verify Channel-to-Target Mapping
description: Verify selecting a channel and target and confirming the mapping
gherkin:
When the user selects the Data Center "MLBDEV"
And selects the channel  Eg: "ATH-PD01-CH-MLBDEV-ONPREM-SCS"
And selects the Targets  Eg: "abc-def-123-456-testing-123"
And clicks the "Confirm" button
Then the user should see a Mapping popup on the screen
And the user should see "Confirm Mapping For: ARI-PD01-CH-MLBDEV-ONPREM-DNV"
And the user should see the popup disappear after clicking on the "Confirm" button on the Confirming Mapping popup.

steps.action:
*When* the user selects the Data Center "MLBDEV"

*And* selects the channel  Eg: "ATH-PD01-CH-MLBDEV-ONPREM-SCS"

*And* selects the Targets  Eg: "abc-def-123-456-testing-123"

*And* clicks the "Confirm" button
steps.result:
*Then* the user should see a Mapping popup on the screen 

*And* the user should see "Confirm Mapping For: ARI-PD01-CH-MLBDEV-ONPREM-DNV"

*And* the user should see the popup disappear after clicking on the "Confirm" button on the Confirming Mapping popup.
